role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on scripts (Arabic/Latin) and bilingual sign layouts.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color, and vegetation density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed xeric shrubs and halophytes appropriate to the biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, guardrails, and sign standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (fencing, poles) and camera artifacts.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (UAE) by leveraging strong meta-evidence (camera artifacts, specific infrastructure) to disambiguate between visually similar Gulf states.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Arabic and English text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat, sandy desert terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the road markings and fencing.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly observed the camera blur and infrastructure style.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted the ground truth (United Arab Emirates).
